nodes.label: Search GET requests should be routed to content-service (not im-service).
Search POST requests should be routed to content-service.
Notifier endpoints must NOT be switched to content-service — they stay on im-ser
Monitoring groups endpoints must NOT be switched — they stay on im-service.
Verify the search_requests counter exists in the registry with expected labels.
Verify the search_duration histogram exists in the registry.
